title: Regression in lint check ("Wide Op w/ no temp" internal error)

features.name: variable part select with multiplied offset on unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a variable-width part select (+: syntax) on an unpacked array where the bit offset involves multiplication (e.g., i*39 +: 32)

features.name: wide operation part select assignment with non-32-bit-aligned offset
features.description: Code should include a 32-bit part select assignment where the source offset is not 32-bit aligned (multiplied by 39) and destination offset has different multiplier (32)
